channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Exotic Milk
item.description: Have you ever wanted milk from an entity that doesnt normally produce milk? Now's your chance!

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: Catch and Release: Fish
item.description: Catch fish live and place them in various sized aquariums.

item.title: rawNature
item.description: Adds materials, recipes, items, and a new balance of things to the game

item.title: Death Exile
item.description: Value your life - death has consequences. Die and face a ban, ghost mode, or 24h exile.

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: Useful Traders Chonky Patch
item.description: Adds Chonky Vessels to Useful Traders.

item.title: Woodsman
item.description: Realistic tree felling — whole trees topple over, then the stumps grow back.

item.title: Modular Backpacks: Equus Compatibility
item.description: Compatibility patch for Modular Backpacks and Equus

item.title: Modular Backpacks
item.description: Makes vanilla backpacks modular, allowing you to attach addons to extend storage slots.

item.title: Enhanced Lightning Visuals
item.description: Reshapes lightning into varied bolt types — jagged, smooth arched, forked, crawler, and upward

item.title: BetterChinese
item.description: 更好的汉化

item.title: Forgiving Quench
item.description: Failing a quench reduces its durability instead of instantly destroying the tool.

item.title: Lottery Tickets
item.description: Adds a machine that sells and redeems scratch-off lottery tickets.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: SkyTp
item.description: Teleport Gui for Skyblock server

item.title: Wildcraft x Expanded Foods Compatability
item.description: A work-in-progress mod that aims to act as a bridge between Wildcraft: F&N + Expanded Foods

item.title: BagsPlus
item.description: This a fork of SpecializedBags Revived with a few things from BackPackPlus for my personal server.

item.title: Animalica - Hooved Animals
item.description: Adds all the hooved animals as playable models!

item.title: Animalica - Small & Odd
item.description: Adds the small goober animals like raccoons, chickens, and rabbits as players

item.title: Animalica - Bears
item.description: Adds Bears as player choices

item.title: Animalica Core
item.description: Core mod for playable animals. Does nothing on it's own

item.title: Uppsalchemy
item.description: A multi-tier alchemy system that uses A Culinary Artillery bottles.

item.title: Northern Ores
item.description: Gradually increases metal ore generation as players travel farther north.

item.title: Achievements
item.description: Adds vanilla, lore, AllClasses, Hod and Primitive Survival Achievements and random rewards

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Fitting Room
item.description: Hover over an item of clothing and press a key to preview your character wearing it.

item.title: Compost-this
item.description: Compost This to accelerate your rot production

item.title: Butterfly Cases - Reborn
item.description: Adds more options for displaying your butterfly collection!

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!
